locator.quote: Replace the hardcoded 12s/agent/day wizard estimate with historical

text: The fix: replace the hardcoded 12s/agent/day wizard estimate with historical timing from the last completed run, falling back to 12s only when no history exists.

locator.quote: with an arbitrary 60/40 train/eval split. Real timing varies by 3-5x.

text: The wizard estimate is wildly off: a hardcoded constant with an arbitrary 60/40 train/eval split, while real timing varies by 3-5x.
